articles.description: George Russell leads Kimi Antonelli to a Mercedes one-two in the only practice session at the Chinese Grand Prix before the sprint weekend starts to unfold.
articles.title: Chinese Grand Prix 2026: George Russell tops practice

articles.description: Unai Emery becomes the quickest of the three Aston Villa managers to reach 100 victories as his side defeat Lille in the Europa League last 16.
articles.title: Aston Villa: Unai Emery reaches milestone in win over Lille

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Nottingham Forest vs Midtjylland in the UEFA Europa League
articles.title: Nottingham Forest vs Midtjylland: UEFA Europa League stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Abrar Ahmed is bought by Sunrisers Leeds in the men’s Hundred auction to allay concerns Pakistan players would be ignored by franchises affiliated to the IPL.
articles.title: Hundred auction: Pakistan spinner Abrar Ahmed signed by Sunrisers Leeds

articles.description: US president Donald Trump says Iran are "welcome" at the 2026 World Cup but it is not "appropriate" for them to be there.
articles.title: Donald Trump: US president says Iran 'welcome' at 2026 World Cup but not 'appropriate'

articles.description: Mercedes driver George Russell accuses Ferrari of being "selfish" for blocking a change to the rules to improve safety at race starts.
articles.title: Formula 1: George Russell says Ferrari 'selfish' over rule change

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Crystal Palace vs AEK Larnaca in the UEFA Conference League
articles.title: Crystal Palace 0-0 AEK Larnaca: Eagles frustrated in Conference League stalemate

articles.description: Jonny Clayton struggles with gout but still wins night six of the Premier League in Nottingham by crushing Luke Humphries 6-1 in the final.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Jonny Clayton beats Luke Humphries

articles.description: Fin Smith says his on-pitch disagreement with England captain Maro Itoje shows the depth of their relationship, rather than any disintegration of team unity.
articles.title: Six Nations: Fin Smith and Maro Itoje brush off on-pitch row

articles.description: Defending champion Rory McIlroy recovers from a back injury to begin his defence of the Players Championship but he ends round one seven shots off the pace.
articles.title: Players Championship: Rory McIlroy fit but off first-round pace at Sawgrass
